name: Free Pick up Shipping Setup
body: [{"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Neto partners can set this up for you. "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://www.netohq.com/job-request-portal", "children": [{"text": "Visit the job request portal"}]}, {"text": " for a quote."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Set up a Free Pickup Shipping Option"}], "data-id": "1"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To set up a free pickup shipping option."}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Shipping", "bold": true}, {"text": " and select "}, {"text": "Shipping Options", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the "}, {"text": "Add new Shipping Option", "bold": true}, {"text": " button."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select "}, {"text": "Set My Own Pricing", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Free Pickup", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Enter a "}, {"text": "Name", "bold": true}, {"text": " and "}, {"text": "Description", "bold": true}, {"text": ", and set who should see this shipping option in checkout, then click "}, {"text": "Next Step", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Review the settings, and click "}, {"text": "Complete", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Your "}, {"text": "Local Pickup", "bold": true}, {"text": " shipping option will now be created for all shipping categories."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Display Free Pickup Last In Checkout"}], "data-id": "display-free-pickup-last-in-checkout"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "We also suggest setting the "}, {"text": "Sort Order", "bold": true}, {"text": " for your free pickup option, so that it isn't selected by default during checkout."}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "In your Neto control panel navigate to "}, {"text": "Shipping", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Shipping Options", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click the name of the free pickup shipping option you created to edit it."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Enter a number in the "}, {"text": "Sort Order", "bold": true}, {"text": " field. The shipping option with the lowest number will appear first, so you should enter to a high number (e.g. 100). This should make it appear last, but you may also need to set the sort order for your other shipping options as well. Click "}, {"text": "Save", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Navigate to "}, {"text": "Webstore", "bold": true}, {"text": " > "}, {"text": "Checkout Settings", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "n the "}, {"text": "Shipping Rules", "bold": true}, {"text": " section, change the "}, {"text": "Default shipping option", "bold": true}, {"text": " to "}, {"text": "Sort Order", "bold": true}, {"text": " and "}, {"text": "Save", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If some products do are not able to be picked up locally, you'll need to configure your shipping categories for the items that cannot be picked up. See our "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1628-add-a-shipping-category", "children": [{"text": "article on shipping categories"}]}, {"text": " to help you further."}]}]
